name: RetroAchievements
author: Lumia Stream
description: Track RetroAchievements profile stats, recently played games, and unlocked achievements in Lumia.
keywords: retroachievements, retro gaming, achievements, hardcore mode

settings.label: RetroAchievements Web API Key
settings.helperText: Get this key from your RetroAchievements account settings.

settings.label: Poll Interval (seconds)
settings.helperText: How often to refresh profile/game data (15-900 seconds).

settings.label: Enable Debug Logs
settings.helperText: Writes detailed RetroAchievements diagnostics to Lumia logs.

actions.label: Refresh Now
actions.description: Force an immediate profile and achievement refresh.

actions.label: Fetch Game Progress
actions.description: Fetch progress by game title (recently played) or game ID.

fields.label: Game Title or Game ID
fields.helperText: Title matching uses your recently played list.

variables.name: last_game_id
variables.description: Most recent game ID from profile.

variables.name: last_game_title
variables.description: Most recent game title from profile.

variables.name: last_game_console
variables.description: Console name for last game (when available).

variables.name: last_game_icon
variables.description: Game icon URL for last game.

variables.name: last_game_achievement_total
variables.description: Total achievements in the last game.

variables.name: last_game_achievement_unlocked
variables.description: Unlocked achievements in the last game.

variables.name: last_game_achievement_unlocked_hardcore
variables.description: Hardcore unlocked achievements in the last game.
